overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt path beside railroad tracks through rural prairie. The weather transitions from stormy overcast to clear blue skies as the character passes grazing animals and encounters a horse rider.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path alongside railroad tracks with grazing animals

events.description: storm clouds dissipate and sunlight breaks through, dramatically brightening the scene
sheep on the right side of path move away and exit view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside railroad tracks

notable_agents.action: sheep grazing on the grass beside the tracks
sheep standing near the path before moving away into the grass

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks running parallel to the dirt path
large green oak tree beside the tracks
unpaved dirt road with wagon wheel ruts
dark heavy storm clouds covering the sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path beside railroad tracks under dark storm clouds. Two sheep graze nearby - one on the left by the tracks and one on the right. As the character progresses, the storm clouds rapidly clear and bright sunlight illuminates the prairie landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with railroad tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit dirt path through open grassland

entered.detail: wooden telegraph pole with crossbars beside the railroad tracks
line of green trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Under clear blue skies, the character continues walking along the prairie path. The landscape opens up with golden grass stretching to the horizon. Wooden utility poles line the railroad tracks on the left, and a distant forest becomes visible ahead.

events.description: horse rider enters from the left and overtakes the character
approaching wooden signpost at trail junction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a horse rider passes by from behind

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse overtaking the character on the left side and moving ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden signpost with directional signs at trail junction
dense cluster of trees in the valley ahead

segments.scene_description: A horse rider approaches from behind and passes the character on the left, continuing ahead down the path. The terrain becomes more varied with forested hills visible in the distance. The character approaches a wooden signpost marking a trail junction.

scene_state.functional_zone: trail junction with signpost leading to wooded valley

events.description: character passes the wooden signpost on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past the signpost and continuing toward the tree-lined valley

entered.detail: rocky hillside with sparse vegetation and trees

segments.scene_description: The character passes the wooden signpost and continues along the path toward a valley filled with trees. The landscape features rolling hills and a prominent mountain ridge on the right as the trail leads into more densely vegetated terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural prairie path that transforms from a dark, stormy atmosphere into a bright, expansive wilderness. It begins with the character walking beside railroad tracks under heavy storm clouds, passing grazing sheep as the sky rapidly clears to reveal brilliant sunlight. As the lighting shifts, the scene opens into a vast landscape of golden grass and wooden utility poles, with a distant forest emerging on the horizon under a clear blue sky. The camera continues forward as a horse rider passes on the left, moving toward a wooden signpost while the terrain evolves into rolling hills and forested ridges. Finally, the path leads past the trail junction and descends into a lush valley filled with dense vegetation and a prominent mountain ridge.
